gist.headline: Pollicode Polished
gist.blurb: We've scrubbed the decks for `oh-my-pollicode`. New tests, correct API maps, and clearer instructions make setup a breeze.
gist.summary: Updated the `oh-my-pollicode` package with corrected API endpoints, improved error messaging, and comprehensive installation tests.
gist.impact: Users will experience a smoother, more reliable installation flow with clearer guidance.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot preparing a shipment. The robot is checking a list (tests) while Polly places a 'Ready' sticker on a pixelated cardboard box. The box represents the NPM package.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and a cute monitor robot preparing a pixelated cardboard box for shipping. The robot holds a checklist. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft peach gradient background. Warm lighting, wholesome vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel text on box: 'NPM'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
